This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Container name set inside a shadow tree should not match query for host child on the outside
  assert_not_equals: got disallowed value "rgb(255, 0, 0)"
[FAIL] Container name set on :host from inside a shadow tree not matching query for slotted from the outside of the shadow tree
  assert_not_equals: got disallowed value "rgb(255, 0, 0)"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
